campaigns.title: SVX — Webinar Re-engagement
campaigns.webinarAngle: Exclusivity — SVX investor audience gets early access to the Climate Tech Exit Lab framework before it goes public. BTC brings the content, SVX brings the list.
campaigns.usageNote: Bryan had interest from SVX at end of 2024. This is a re-engagement touch. Subject: Picking back up — webinar idea for your community.
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hey [Name],

Hope the new year is treating you well. We connected late last year and I've been thinking about a collaboration that could be a good fit for your community.

We're running a webinar series around climate tech exits — breaking down how exits actually work in this space for small-check investors who want to understand the landscape better before they commit capital. It's practical, framework-driven, and honestly underserved content.

I'd love to co-host one with SVX. You bring the audience, we bring the content. Low lift on your end.

Worth a 20-minute call to see if it makes sense?

campaigns.title: Ontario Clean Tech Industry Association — Webinar Pitch
campaigns.webinarAngle: Peer credibility — not an investor lecture, a practitioner conversation. BTC as operators who understand the founder journey. Frame as a community session on what exits actually look like for climate founders.
campaigns.usageNote: Bryan's direct network. First touch. Lead with value to founders and operators in their community, not the BTC brand.
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hey [Name],

I run Black Tech Capital — a climate tech nano VC — and I've been building out a webinar series for the climate tech ecosystem.

The content is practitioner-focused: how exits actually work in climate tech, told by people who've been close to them. Not a panel, not a pitch — real frameworks for founders and operators trying to understand what the path forward looks like.

I think your members would get a lot out of it, and I'd love to co-host a session with OCTIA. You bring the community, we bring the content.

Open to a quick call to see if it's a fit?

campaigns.title: Clean Tech North — Webinar Pitch
campaigns.webinarAngle: Regional investment — BTC is building with the Canadian climate tech ecosystem, not passing through. Webinar is a proof point of that commitment. Co-branded session positions both orgs as investing in the region.
campaigns.usageNote: Bryan's direct network. Regional identity is the lever. Lead with community investment framing.
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hey [Name],

I'm Bryan — I run Black Tech Capital, a climate tech nano VC, and I've been intentional about building with the Canadian ecosystem, not just operating in it.

I'm putting together a webinar series on climate tech exits — practical content for founders and investors in the space — and I think a co-branded session with Clean Tech North would be a natural fit. You have the regional reach, we have the framework.

Would love to connect and see if there's something here.

campaigns.title: KAFD — Webinar Pitch
campaigns.webinarAngle: Credibility amplification — co-branding with BTC signals to their network they are connected to emerging climate tech fund managers doing real work. Position as a mutual visibility play.
campaigns.blocker: Need full org name and correct contact from Bryan before outreach.
campaigns.usageNote: KAFD full name and contact TBC — confirm with Bryan before sending anything.

campaigns.title: Good Investor (Tim) — Webinar Pitch
campaigns.webinarAngle: Peer-to-peer — Tim is a small-check investor himself (~$10K), so his network is other people trying to figure out the same thing. Frame it as: his people want a framework for $10K climate bets, we'll give them one. No institutional framing.
campaigns.blocker: Need Tim's last name from Bryan before outreach.
campaigns.usageNote: Bryan direct connection. Most casual of the five pitches. Get Tim's last name from Bryan first.
campaigns.emailDraft:
Hey Tim,

Bryan here. We connected through [context] — I run Black Tech Capital.

I'm putting together a webinar for small-check climate tech investors. The kind of people trying to figure out how to make a smart $10K bet in the space and actually understand how exits work. No fluff, just the real framework.

Thought you might have folks in your network who'd want in, and maybe interested in co-hosting. You bring the people, we bring the content.

Worth a quick chat?

campaigns.title: BTC Compliance Calendar — TIP Member Feedback Follow-up
campaigns.contactOrg: TIP (The Impact Project or similar — confirm name)
campaigns.waitingOn: TIP member response to feedback request on BTC compliance calendar
campaigns.usageNote: Keyona followed up with a TIP member for feedback on the BTC compliance calendar. Ball is in their court. Check back if no response in 5-7 days.
